title: The Star Wars Cookbook: Wookiee Cookies and Other Galactic Recipes
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Cookbook|more=Cookie}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Wookiee_Cookbook.jpg]] |title=''The Star Wars Cookbook:
Wookiee Cookies and
Other Galactic Recipes'' |author=[[Robin Davis]] |cover artist= |illustrator=[[Frankie Frankeny]] (photography) |editor= |publisher=[[Chronicle Books]] |release date=[[September]] [[1998]]{{Chronicle|url=products/wookiee-cookies|text= Star Wars Wookiee Cookies}} |type=Bound spiral |pages=60 |dimensions=8.8 × 7.2 × 0.7 inches |weight=13.3 ounces |isbn=9780811821841 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''The Star Wars Cookbook: Wookiee Cookies and Other Galactic Recipes''''' is a cookbook published in [[1998]], featuring a total of 27 ''[[Star Wars]]''–themed recipes. As the cookbook is intended for a young audience, the recipes are simple, all of which may be attempted by older children on their own, or by younger children with adequate parental supervision and guidance. In keeping with its function as a working cookbook, the recipes are printed on a glossy, waterproof paper which can be wiped clean in case of spillage. The exception to this is the last page of the cookbook, which is actually a pull-out-and-keep page of ''Star Wars''–themed food-label stickers featuring [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Now ''Star Wars'' fans of any age can cook food that is truly out of this world. From C-3PO Pancakes to Jedi Juice Pops, this intergalactic cookbook features healthy snacks, delicious dishes, sweet treats, and easy-to-use recipes that will entice even the pickiest eaters.'' ==Contents== ===Beverages=== *[[Hoth chocolate|Hoth Chocolate]] *[[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] Jive Milkshakes *[[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalker]] Smoothies *[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] Soda ===Breakfasts=== *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] Pancakes *[[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] Morsels *[[Oola/Legends|Oola]]-la French Toast *[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] Danish Dos *[[Binary star/Legends|Twin Sun]] Toast ===Desserts=== *[[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] Brownies *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] Dark Chocolate Sundaes *[[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] Popcorn Balls *[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] Treats *[[Desert stormtrooper/Legends|Sandtrooper]] Sandies *[[Wampa/Legends|Wampa]] Snow Cones *[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] Cookies ===Main Courses=== *[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]-uccine *Crazy [[Cantina/Legends|Cantina]] Chili *[[The galaxy/Legends|Galaxy]] Grilled Cheese *[[Greedo/Legends|Greedo's]] Burritos *[[Han Solo/Legends|Han]]-burgers *[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan]] Kebabs *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] Ties ===Snacks and Sides=== *[[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark Side]] Salsa *[[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] Eats *[[The Force/Legends|The Force]] Fruit Fun *[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] Jiggle *[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Juice Pops *[[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] Taters
